corrected_fields.summary: This page describes four COVID-19 related fiscal assistance programs administered by the Treasury Department: Economic Impact Payments (direct relief sent in three rounds), Unemployment Compensation (extended via American Rescue Plan), an expanded Child Tax Credit, and Emergency Rental Assistance. The content is informational and describes historical programs from 2020-2021 rather than providing current market-relevant analysis or policy announcements.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This source provides no current market-relevant information. It describes historical COVID-era fiscal stimulus programs that have already concluded. There is no discussion of macro implications, market impact, or policy path forward. Not useful for real-time or forward-looking financial analysis.
